# Listings

Operations related to listings. Listings are the core entity that connects properties with media services.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/listings` | List listings. | Bearer token required |
| `POST` | `/listings` | Create listing. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/listings/{listing_id}` | Get listing. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/listings/{listing_id}` | Update listing. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/listings/{listing_id}/cubi-casa` | Get listing Cubicasa information. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/listings/{listing_id}/details/search` | Search listing details. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/listings/{listing_id}/stats` | Get listing statistics. | Bearer token required |

## `GET /listings`

List listings.

Lists all listings available to a group.

- Operation ID: `get-listings`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError403`, `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `ListingCollection`

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `include` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of optional data to include in the response. |
| `filter[search]` | `query` | No | string | Return listings that have fields matching this term. |
| `filter[address]` | `query` | No | string | Return listings that have an address matching this term. |
| `filter[list_agent]` | `query` | No | string | Return listings that have a listing agent or co-listing agent matching this term. |
| `filter[status]` | `query` | No | enum (`DRAFT`, `COMING_SOON`, `FOR_LEASE`, `FOR_SALE`, `PENDING_SALE` ...) | Return listings that have a certain status. |
| `filter[active]` | `query` | No | boolean | Set as true to return listings that have an active status (e.g. active statuses include `COMING_SOON`, `FOR_SALE`, `FOR_LEASE`, `PENDING_SALE`, `PENDING_LEASE`, `SOLD`, `LEASED`). |
| `filter[price_gte]` | `query` | No | number | Return listings where the price field is greater than or equal to this value. |
| `filter[price_lte]` | `query` | No | number | Return listings where the price field is less than or equal to this value. |
| `filter[square_feet_gte]` | `query` | No | number | Return listings where the square feet field is greater than or equal to this value. |
| `filter[square_feet_lte]` | `query` | No | number | Return listings where the square feet field is less than or equal to this value. |
| `filter[bedrooms_gte]` | `query` | No | integer | Return listings where the bedrooms field is greater than or equal to this value. |
| `filter[bedrooms_lte]` | `query` | No | integer | Return listings where the bedrooms field is less than or equal to this value. |
| `filter[bathrooms_gte]` | `query` | No | number | Return listings where the bathrooms field is greater than or equal to this value. |
| `filter[bathrooms_lte]` | `query` | No | number | Return listings where the bathrooms field is less than or equal to this value. |
| `filter[delivery_status]` | `query` | No | enum (`DELIVERED`, `UNDELIVERED`, `SCHEDULED`) | Return listings where the delivery status is equal to this value. |
| `filter[showcase]` | `query` | No | boolean | Return listings associated with a Showcase media request. |
| `sort` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of fields used for sorting. Placing a minus symbol in front of a field name sorts in descending order. Defaults to `-created_at`. |
| `per_page` | `query` | No | string | The number of items per page. Defaults to 25. |
| `page` | `query` | No | string | The requested page. Defaults to 1. |

### Request Body

None.

### Responses

| Status | Description | Content |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `200` | ListingCollection | `application/json`: `ListingCollection` |
| `403` | ApiError403 | `application/json`: `ApiError403` |
| `404` | ApiError404 | `application/json`: `ApiError404` |
| `422` | ApiFail422 | `application/json`: `ApiFail422` |
| `500` | ApiError500 | `application/json`: `ApiError500` |
